basic_details.job_title: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 13 Stenographer, Driver and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Vidyapith (GV) Stenographer, Driver and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 16 June 2026 on the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the GV Stenographer, Driver and More Posts Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits. Age Relaxation: PwBD age relaxation SC/ST-15 years, OBC-13 Years and Unreserved-10 Years (varies by post).

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree, Bachelor's degree, 12th Class pass, Matriculation Pass
qualification.details: Subject Matter Specialist (Agricultural Engineering)-T6: Master's degree in Processing and Food Engineering from a recognized university. Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture)-T6: Master's degree in agriculture with specialization in Horticulture / Master's degree in Horticulture from recognised university. Programme Assistant (Computer)-T4: Bachelor's degree in Computer science / Computer application or equivalent from a recognized university. Stenographer Grade-III: 12th Class pass or equivalent from a recognized Board or University. Professional efficiency: The candidates will be given one dictation test in Gujarati at 80 w.p.m. for 10 minutes. The candidates who opt to take the test in Gujarati will be required to transcribe the matter in 65 minutes on computer. Driver: Matriculation Pass qualification from a recognized board. Possession of a valid HMV driving license from prescribed government authority. Desirable: One year trade certificate in the relevant field from ITI; or Experience of driving in a recognized institution; or Experience of motor mechanic work. Skilled Support Staff: Matriculation or equivalent pass OR ITI pass. Subject Matter Specialist (Extension Education)-T6: Master's degree in agriculture with specialization in Extension Education / Agriculture Extension from recognised university.

selection_process: Written Test Skill Test Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gujarat Vidyapith Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download Gujarat Vidyapith Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.gujarat_vidyapith: Master's degree, Bachelor's degree, 12th Class pass, Matriculation Pass

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Gujarat Vidyapith Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Gujarat Vidyapith Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Subject Matter Specialist (Agricultural Engineering)-T6: Master's degree in Processing and Food Engineering from a recognized university. Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture)-T6: Master's degree in agriculture with specialization in Horticulture / Master's degree in Horticulture from recognised university. Programme Assistant (Computer)-T4: Bachelor's degree in Computer science / Computer application or equivalent from a recognized university. Stenographer Grade-III: 12th Class pass or equivalent from a recognized Board or University. Professional efficiency: The candidates will be given one dictation test in Gujarati at 80 w.p.m. for 10 minutes. The candidates who opt to take the test in Gujarati will be required to transcribe the matter in 65 minutes on computer. Driver: Matriculation Pass qualification from a recognized board. Possession of a valid HMV driving license from prescribed government authority. Desirable: One year trade certificate in the relevant field from ITI; or Experience of driving in a recognized institution; or Experience of motor mechanic work. Skilled Support Staff: Matriculation or equivalent pass OR ITI pass. Subject Matter Specialist (Extension Education)-T6: Master's degree in agriculture with specialization in Extension Education / Agriculture Extension from recognised university.

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: All Posts: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limits. Age Relaxation: PwBD age relaxation SC/ST-15 years, OBC-13 Years and Unreserved-10 Years (varies by post).

rows.event: Date of Commencement of online Application
Last date of receipt of hardcopy of online application

content_sections.heading: Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test Skill Test Interview Document Verification

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Gujarat Vidyapith Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat Vidyapith Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Gujarat Vidyapith recruitment is 19 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for Subject Matter Specialist / Programme Assistant / Stenographer / Driver / Skilled Support Staff posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is 1000.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Skilled Support Staff post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Skilled Support Staff post is Matriculation or equivalent pass OR ITI pass.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary structure ranges from Pay Level-1 to Pay Level-10, depending on the post.

faq.question: Q6. What are the selection methods for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written Test, Skill Test, Interview, and Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is age relaxation for PwBD candidates: 15 years for SC/ST, 13 years for OBC, and 10 years for Unreserved candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply offline for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, applications must be submitted online through the official Gujarat Vidyapith website.

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of Gujarat Vidyapith?
faq.answer: The official website of Gujarat Vidyapith is https://gujaratvidyapith.org.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 05/2026-27.
